titleStmt.title: SII 24.271: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 271. (A.R. No. 70 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift of gold by Sāhala-Bhaṭṭa, son of Āhala-Bhaṭṭa, of the Sākalagōtra, who belonged to the community of Paradēśi-sāvaśī merchants, for offerings during one service in the temple and for supplying garlands to the god for his own merit and that of his son. The details of date viz. 8th year, Makara, śu. 5, Monday, Uttiraṭṭādi regularly correspond to A.D. 1263, January 15, f.d.t. ·10; ·76.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . sārvabhauma śrīmat pratāpa cakravattikaḷ pocaḷa śrīvirarāma nātha tevaṟku yāṇṭu 8 vatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattupañcamiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamai yum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ koyil senā
pati Āḻvār śrī koyiṟ kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum mutal karaṇattāṉum . parateci cāvāci viyāpārikaḷil sākala gottirattu Āhala bhaṭṭaṉ makaṉ sāhala bhaṭṭaṉukku nāṅkaḷ kalveṭṭik kuṭutta paricāvatu . taṉakkum taṉ piḷḷaikaḷukkum naṉṟāka
śrī raṅganāthaṉ Oru [san=ti] tiruvārātaṉaṅ koṇṭaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷap paṇṇa veṇu meṉṟum Itukku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu mavaiyiṟṟukku nāṉ tarukiṟa poṉṉaik kaikkoṇṭu Iraṇṭāṟṟukku naṭuvupaṭṭa viḷainilatti
le ciṟutu viḷainilam Idharmmattukku Uṭalāka tantu Innilattil Uḷḷa Utaiyaṅ koṇṭu nāḷ Oṉṟukkut tiruvaraṅka tevanāle tūṇi Ariciāy nālu taḷikai yum tiruppoṉakam Amutu ceytaruḷap paṇṇa veṇu meṉṟum Inta sa
ndhikku tiruppaḷḷittāmattukkum vaṉamālaikkum Oru tirunantavaṉattukku nilantara veṇumeṉṟum Idharmmam candrādityavat celvatāka kalveṭṭit taraveṇum Eṉṟum jiyaṟkum Eṅkaḷukkum samayattukkum collukaiyile
pacāṉa mutal tiruvaraṅka tevaṉāle nāḷ Oṉṟukku tūṇi tiruppoṉakam paḻavariciyum Itukkut takka ney Amutum kaṟi Amutum paruppamutum Uppamutum miḷakamutum Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷum cantaṉak kāppu ḻuku Uḷḷiṭṭa
kkaṭavatākavum Itukkuṭalāka tirukkuṟaipaṟṟil teṉ Oḻuku tirunāmattuk kāṇi maṉṟacca viḷākattu nalantikaḻnārāyaṇan tiruttil teṟkil karaikkut teṟku teṉṉāṟṟil vaṭakaraikku vaṭakku Ittiruttu melaic cuṟṟukku
kaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nila tiruttu viḷai nilattile Iraṇṭarai veli nilam Ivaṉ dharmmamāṉa sandhikkuṭalākak kaṭavatākavum Innilattukku mūlyattukkum tirut teṟṟikkum Oṭukka niścayitta varākan tarāttūkkam poṉ muṉṉūṟum Isandhikkum
tiruppaḷḷittāmattukkum vaṉamālaikkum saāvācit tirunantavaṉattukkuk kiḻakkuppaṭṭat tirunantavaṉattile Irunūṟu kuḻi Ivaṉukku naṉṟāka jiyar teyvaccilaip perumāḷtātar tirunantavaṉam ceytu vaṉamālaiyum tirup paḷḷittāmamum Eṭu
kkak kaṭavarākavum . Itu maulyamāka niccayittu tarāttūkkam varākaṉ poṉ Aiñpatum Āka Ippoṉ muṉṉūṟṟaiñpatum tirukkoṭṭakārattile Oṭukkukaiyāle Idharmmam nityasiddhamāka cellak kaṭavatāka kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom cāvāci
sākala gotrattu sākalabhaṭṭaṉukku Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ koyil śrīvaiṣṇavak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum mutal karaṇattomum §
Digital edition of SII 24.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
